CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL( Classification__c , "ירוק") , IMAGE("https://assuta--c.um5.content.force.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cXlL&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1559558276000", "" , 30,30), IF( ISPICKVAL( Classification__c, "כתום") , IMAGE("https://assuta--c.um5.content.force.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cXlP&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1559558276000", "" , 30,30), IF( ISPICKVAL( Classification__c, "אדום") , IMAGE("https://assuta--c.um5.content.force.com/servlet/servlet.ImageServer?id=0154J000000cXlR&oid=00DKI000000MTJU&lastMod=1559558276000", "" ,30,30),"")))
CustomField.label: Courses Icon
